title: Kafka Streams
learningObjectives: Tune **window** **grace**, **suppress**, and **retention** for late data policies
Operate **Kafka Streams** with disk, **restore**, and **standby** awareness
Contrast **at-least-once** and **exactly-once** processing modes with broker requirements
Use **Interactive Queries** safely with authentication and data classification

sections.title: Why Kafka Streams matters
sections.content:
**Kafka Streams** collapses **stream** processing into **library** form—no separate **cluster** to babysit—but **state**, **partitions**, and **join** constraints still dominate **on-call** stories.

Interviewers expect you to know **changelog**, **restore**, **repartition**, and **grace** trade-offs with numbers.

sections.title: Theory and Internals - Kafka Streams
sections.content:
### Day 63 — **Kafka** **Streams**

### 1. Building blocks
**StreamsBuilder**, **KStream**, **KTable**, **GlobalKTable**.

### 2. Stateful ops
**aggregate**, **reduce**, **join** with **materialized** stores.

### 3. Fault tolerance
**Changelog** + **restore** from Kafka.

### 4. Windows
**Tumbling**, **sliding**, **grace**.

### 5. EOS
**Exactly-once** processing toggle and broker requirements.

### 6. Story
**Restore** storm after retention misconfig → extend retention + **standby**.

sections.title: Basic — Streams vocabulary
sections.output:
KStream: append-only event flow
KTable: compacted changelog view
changelog: durable backing log for state

sections.title: Intermediate — Word split toy
sections.description: Split line to tokens for windowed count mental model.

sections.title: Advanced — Window bucket toy
Stateful processor with changelog
sections.description: Tasks persist to RocksDB and changelog topic.
sections.plantuml:
@startuml
title Day 63 — Kafka Streams state
participant Task
database RocksDB
queue Changelog
Task -> RocksDB : read/write
Task -> Changelog : append updates
Changelog -> Task : restore on restart
@enduml

sections.title: Exercise — Kafka Streams — stateful ops (Day 63 assignment)
Interview Drill

conceptual.question: What is a **topology**?
conceptual.answer: Directed graph of **processors** (sources, sinks, stateful ops) compiled from **StreamsBuilder**. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads.

followUps.question: Production follow-up: which **dashboards** or **metrics** expose this for **Kafka Streams**?
followUps.answer: Start with **client** **outbound** **histograms** and **resilience4j** **circuitbreaker** **state** **gauges**, then open **distributed** **traces** filtered by **service** **name** and **route**. Directed graph of **processors** (sources, sinks, stateful ops) compiled from **StreamsBuilder**. Communicate **executive**-friendly **impact**: **customer** **minutes** degraded, **error** **budget** burn, **mitigation** **ETA**, and **post-incident** **themes** mapped to **roadmap** work. Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings.

followUps.question: How do you **roll out** a policy change here without a **retry** **storm**?
followUps.answer: Use **feature** **flags**, **canary** **deployments**, **tight** **retry** **budgets** on **non-idempotent** calls, and **verify** with **load** tests that **match** **production** **fan-out**. conceptual.question: **KStream** vs **KTable**?
conceptual.answer: **KStream** is **record** stream; **KTable** is **changelog**-backed **key-value** **materialization**. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**.

seniorScenario.question: **Ops:** Disk 95% on **state.dir**.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Stop-the-world risk.

**(2) Root cause** RocksDB **growth** unbounded.

**(3) Fix** Right-size disk + **standby** + compact state.

**(4) Prevention** Alert early. Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**. Call out **ownership**: **platform** **SRE** for **mesh**/**certs**, **service** teams for **timeout** policy, **SRE** for **SLO** **burn** **alerts**—and how those teams **coordinate** during **sev-1** calls. Interviewers reward naming **metrics** (`http_client_requests_seconds`, `resilience4j_circuitbreaker_state`), **trace** correlation IDs, and **rollback** criteria rather than hand-wavy resilience claims. Tie answers to **Spring** reality: **Feign** + **LoadBalancer**, **WebClient** + **`ExchangeFilterFunction`**, **Resilience4j** registries, and **Micrometer** tags that make **on-call** searches fast.

followUps.question: How do you **communicate** **impact** and **ETA** during this incident?
followUps.answer: Share **SLO** **burn**, **customer** **regions** affected, **mitigation** steps in flight, and **explicit** unknowns. Avoid **blaming** **users**; focus on **measurable** recovery criteria. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads.

followUps.question: Which **post-incident** **action** items are **non-negotiable**?
followUps.answer: At minimum: **runbook** update, **dashboard** gap closed, **test** that **reproduces** the failure, and **owner** with **deadline**. Tie themes to **error** **budget** policy. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads.

seniorScenario.question: **Design:** **24/7** analytics wants **exact** late data forever.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Challenge requirements.

**(2) Root cause** Infinite grace impossible.

**(3) Fix** Separate **late lane** topic + **approx** window.

**(4) Prevention** SLA doc. For **gateway** and **service** stacks, emphasize **timeout** ordering (**outer > inner**), **bulkheads** per **tenant**, and **JWT** **cache** **TTL** during **issuer** rotations. Communicate **executive**-friendly **impact**: **customer** **minutes** degraded, **error** **budget** burn, **mitigation** **ETA**, and **post-incident** **themes** mapped to **roadmap** work. Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings. Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**. Call out **ownership**: **platform** **SRE** for **mesh**/**certs**, **service** teams for **timeout** policy, **SRE** for **SLO** **burn** **alerts**—and how those teams **coordinate** during **sev-1** calls.

seniorScenario.question: **Scale:** **Single** **thread** pegs CPU on heavy **aggregate**.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Profile hot store.

**(2) Root cause** Key explosion.

**(3) Fix** Salting for analytics or pre-aggregation upstream.

**(4) Prevention** Capacity model. Call out **ownership**: **platform** **SRE** for **mesh**/**certs**, **service** teams for **timeout** policy, **SRE** for **SLO** **burn** **alerts**—and how those teams **coordinate** during **sev-1** calls. Interviewers reward naming **metrics** (`http_client_requests_seconds`, `resilience4j_circuitbreaker_state`), **trace** correlation IDs, and **rollback** criteria rather than hand-wavy resilience claims. Tie answers to **Spring** reality: **Feign** + **LoadBalancer**, **WebClient** + **`ExchangeFilterFunction`**, **Resilience4j** registries, and **Micrometer** tags that make **on-call** searches fast. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads. When **Kubernetes** is involved, cite **readiness**, **HPA**, **NetworkPolicy**, and **Service** **DNS** as factors that change **latency** independent of **Java** **code**.

seniorScenario.question: **Migration:** **EOS** toggle during peak.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Freeze change.

**(2) Root cause** Abort storm risk.

**(3) Fix** Blue/green apps with feature flag.

**(4) Prevention** Runbook validation. When **Kubernetes** is involved, cite **readiness**, **HPA**, **NetworkPolicy**, and **Service** **DNS** as factors that change **latency** independent of **Java** **code**. wrongAnswers: **Streams** removes need for **topics** — **Correction:** **Internal** topics still exist.
**Join** works without **same** partitions — **Correction:** **Repartition** required unless already aligned.
**Suppress** fixes **ordering** globally — **Correction:** Partition ordering still applies.
**RocksDB** needs no monitoring — **Correction:** **Disk** and **compaction** pressure matter.
**Streams** is only for JVM batch — **Correction:** Continuous streaming model.
**grace=0** is always best — **Correction:** Late data dropped unexpectedly.

sections.title: Cheatsheet
sections.content:
| Concept | Recall |
|---|---|
| topology | Processor graph |
| changelog | Durable state log |
| RocksDB | Local KV persistence |
| repartition | Shuffle via internal topic |
| grace | Late record tolerance |
| IQ | Serve local state |
| EOS mode | Broker + client pairing |
| standby | Faster failover |
| co-partition | Join prerequisite |
| suppress | Reduce output churn |
